query: Best places to visit in Japan

results.snippet: Jul 4, 2023 ... IMO places that are a must are Tokyo, Mt. Fuji, Kyoto and Osaka. From Osaka you can use the JR line to make a day trip ...

results.meta_title: r/travel on Reddit: What are the best cities to visit in Japan for someone who has never been there and has 2 weeks?
results.content:
r/travel is a community about exploring the world. Your pictures, questions, stories, or any good content is welcome. 

Please read the rules and pinned announcements before posting. Failure to do so may result in a permanent ban.

Clickbait, spam, memes, ads/selling/buying, brochures, referrals, classifieds, surveys or self-promotion will be removed. I know Tokyo is a must, and I’m planning on dedicating about 6 days to it. Does this seem reasonable? And as far as what I’m looking to do, a little bit of everything. Japanese culture and history fascinates me, I love anime, good food as well, and I also enjoy being outside (riding bikes, swimming, hiking, etc). Im thinking Kyoto is another good stop because of its historical and cultural significance but looking to hear what others have to say. And I’m an experienced traveler so don’t have a problem going off the beaten path. Anyone have advice? Traveling with my wife who has similar interests to me if it matters. Create your account an
